content.en:
The trade fair of Taichen Palace is divided into two forms: free trade fair and auction.

The level of the free trade fair is uneven, and ordinary treasures may be taken out for trading, and rare treasures may be traded.

However, the treasures in the auction are extremely precious, and ordinary treasures are not eligible to enter the auction.

If you want to get your hands on rare treasures, it's best to go to auctions.

And the auction only accepts one material as currency, that is, the Tongtian Realm Gold Coins, the Tongtian Realm Gold Coin made of Tongtian Realm Gold is planned and formulated by many Heavenly Ancestors, and each Tongtian Realm Gold Coin is exactly the same, and all the realms have unified standards.

The reason why you don't use a piece of Babel Realm Gold to trade is because Babel Realm Gold is different in size, and if it is not uniform, it is difficult to trade.

If you want to participate in the auction, the minimum standard is 10,000 gold coins of the Heavenly Realm, and if you want to participate in the auction, you can only participate in the free trade fair outside.

There are no requirements for the Free Trade Fair, which can be traded with Babel Gold or bartered.

The free trade will start first, while the auction will be some time later.

And this trade fair also had the Great Ancestor of Taiyuan Palace to maintain order, and they directly sent six high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage and dozens of high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage.

Moreover, there is also an incarnation of the Heavenly Ancestor sitting in this giant city, which will not appear under normal circumstances, but once there is a Great Ancestor making trouble, it will definitely be suppressed.

Ye Tian also entered the free trade fair area, he wanted to trade the three treasures of the Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing, the Ancient Shadow Wood and the Heart of the Crystal, as long as he obtained these three treasures, he could intervene to form the immeasurable feather armor seed imprint, and when he broke through to become a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, he could directly give birth to the immeasurable magic technique of the immeasurable feather armor.

There are quite a few high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fourth and fifth stages here, so there must be great ancestors who possess these three kinds of treasures.

Sure enough.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to find a Great Ancestor who was willing to trade the Ancient Immortal Wood.

This Great Ancestor is called Qingling Great Ancestor, and he comes from other realms.

As for his identity, Ye Tian didn't know, but he wouldn't inquire either.

"Qingling Great Ancestor, I want to trade the Ancient Immortal Wood on your body!"

Ye Tian said.

"Gu Ying Wood, this treasure is very rare, what can you come up with?"

Qingling Great Ancestor would not easily trade the Ancient Shadow Wood, after all, this kind of treasure was very scarce, and it was easy to trade out, if there was no suitable treasure, he would not agree to the transaction.

"Is it okay to trade with the Heavenly Realm Gold?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Do you have the Heavenly Realm Gold?" Qingling Great Ancestor was a little surprised, after all, Ye Tian was only a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and the Tongtian Realm Gold was basically in the hands of those fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"Yes!

Ye Tian said lightly.

However, the Blue Zero Great Ancestor shook his head, "I also have the Heavenly Realm Gold, which is enough to participate in the auction." And even if you scrape together some more Heavenly Realm Gold, you may not be able to bid for the treasure you want. So, I don't want to go to the heavenly realm. "

"Where's the Thousand Golden Liquid?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You have a thousand gold liquids, if it is a thousand gold liquids, I am willing to trade. Qingling Great Ancestor hurriedly said.

The Thousand Dao Golden Liquid was too useful, and it was of great use to a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like him.

On the contrary, the Ancient Stygian Wood did not help him much.

Therefore, he was willing to trade a thousand golden liquids with the ancient dark wood.

Subsequently, Ye Tian had a detailed conversation with the Qingling Great Ancestor and determined the transaction price.

One Ancient Shadow Wood can be traded for thirty drops of Thousand Dao Gold Liquid, which is also a very reasonable price.

Ye Tian used three hundred drops of Thousand Dao Gold Liquid to trade ten Ancient Immortal Trees from the hands of the Qingling Great Ancestor.

Soon, they closed the deal and went their separate ways.

"The ancient stygian wood has been traded, and then only the Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing and the Heart of the Trick Crystal are left!"

Ye Tian continued to look for the Great Ancestor to trade these two treasures.

Not long after, Ye Tian traded a Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing from another Great Ancestor, but the Heart of the Tricky Crystal was not traded.

After all, the Heart of the Crystal comes from the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Crystal Realm Clan, even if it is a high-level immeasurable lifeform of the fifth stage, they don't dare to enter the Crystal Realm to kill the powerhouses of the Crystal Clan!

Although he didn't trade the Heart of the Crystal, Ye Tian traded some other treasures, many of which were helpful to his cultivation, so he tried to trade them.

After a period of time, the auction of Taichen Palace is about to begin.

The auction is the most important thing, and the real goodies are there.

Ye Tian naturally wanted to participate in the auction, but he was also ready to auction some items.

For example, through the real gold.

The average Great Ancestor really can't eat the Tongtian Innocent Gold in his hand, and if he gets it at auction, he won't have to worry about not being able to sell it.

And this auction will use the Tongtian Realm gold coins as the currency, and he will be able to obtain a large number of Tongtian Realm gold coins at that time, and he can fuse them into pieces of Tongtian True Gold.

With such a conversion, I don't know how many times I earned directly!

"I still have more than six hundred pieces of Tongtian Innocent Gold in my hand, if I take all of them for auction, it will be too scary, maybe even Taichen Palace will have to be greedy, take ten yuan to trade!!"

Ye Tian decided.

Ten pieces of true gold, Taichen Palace will not be greedy.

......

Soon, Ye Tian found the person in charge of the Taichen Palace auction, the Star Source Great Ancestor.

The Star Source Great Ancestor is a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, very close to the Heavenly Ancestor level, and is specifically responsible for the items in the auction.

When Ye Tian came here to find the Star Source Great Ancestor, the Star Source Great Ancestor didn't care, after all, he didn't think that a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable life form like Ye Tian could come up with anything good.

"This Great Ancestor, what items do you have to auction?"

Xingyuan Great Ancestor asked.

"Heavenly gold!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Tongtian Zhenjin, are you sure you are not wrong?" said the Star Source Great Ancestor in shock.

Tongtian real gold seems to be the same kind of material as Tongtian realm gold, but the value is not known how many times worse!

There are not many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fifth stage that can take out the Tongtian True Gold, and only the Heavenly Ancestor can easily take out the Tongtian True Gold in his hands, but the amount is still not much!

Only a very small number of fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms will know a secret, that is, using a large amount of Tongtian True Gold and other materials can refine a resource according to a certain recipe, which can help fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to impact the Heavenly Ancestor realm.

Because of this, the value of Tongtian gold is terrifying!
